## vitepress-toolkit package

## Functions

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[createFontPreloadTransform(input)](./vitepress-toolkit.createfontpreloadtransform.md)


</td><td>

Create a deterministic VitePress head transform for font preloads.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createSeoPageDataBuilder(options)](./vitepress-toolkit.createseopagedatabuilder.md)


</td><td>

Build detached, idempotent SEO page data. Hosts apply it to VitePress hooks.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createSitemapConfig(input)](./vitepress-toolkit.createsitemapconfig.md)


</td><td>

Build a VitePress-compatible mutable config with detached transport items. The returned array is frozen, while its cloned items remain mutable because SitemapStream normalizes standard fields in place.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[normalizeVitePressFrontmatter(page, options)](./vitepress-toolkit.normalizevitepressfrontmatter.md)


</td><td>

Pure, strict adapter from VitePress content data to a detached content record.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sanitizeHeadEntries(head)](./vitepress-toolkit.sanitizeheadentries.md)


</td><td>

Detach head tuples and retain only primitive attribute/inner values.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

<tr><td>

[SeoBuildContext](./vitepress-toolkit.seobuildcontext.md)


</td><td>

Canonical URL context passed to host JSON-LD generators.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SeoFrontmatterResult](./vitepress-toolkit.seofrontmatterresult.md)


</td><td>

Required result of a host frontmatter normalizer.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SeoPageData](./vitepress-toolkit.seopagedata.md)


</td><td>

Package-owned structural page-data contract compatible with VitePress 1.x. It prevents consumers from loading VitePress's complete build-tool type graph merely to use the framework-neutral SEO builder.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SeoPageDataResult](./vitepress-toolkit.seopagedataresult.md)


</td><td>

SEO builder output with a sanitized, always-present head collection.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SeoPageHeader](./vitepress-toolkit.seopageheader.md)


</td><td>

Package-owned structural heading contract compatible with VitePress 1.x.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SitemapItem](./vitepress-toolkit.sitemapitem.md)


</td><td>

Minimal VitePress sitemap item understood by draft filtering and URL resolution.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[TransformHeadContext](./vitepress-toolkit.transformheadcontext.md)


</td><td>

Generated asset context accepted by the head transform.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[VitePressPageData](./vitepress-toolkit.vitepresspagedata.md)


</td><td>

Framework-neutral subset of VitePress content data accepted by the adapter.


</td></tr>
